instruction: Document what exists, not what should exist — never invent design values
When a design value is missing, write 'TBD — not yet defined' rather than leaving the section empty or inventing a value
Run grep for CSS custom properties (--) in :root and @theme blocks as Step 1
Check for Tailwind config (v3: tailwind.config.js; v4: @theme in CSS) during token discovery
Read 3–5 representative component/page files to understand how tokens are used in practice
Note which dark mode strategy is used: class-based .dark, prefers-color-scheme media query, or data attribute
Check accessibility patterns: aria- attributes, role=, focus-visible, visually-hidden, sr-only
Populate templates/skill-output.yaml BEFORE writing any markdown — use it as a structured scratchpad
Validate the populated YAML against schemas/design-reference.schema.json before proceeding to markdown generation
All required fields in skill-output.yaml must have real values (not TBD) before proceeding; genuinely unknown fields may stay TBD but must be listed in the Step 8 report
Create docs/design/ directory and write design-reference.md using references/design-reference-template.md
Replace all {PROJECT_NAME} and {TOKEN_*} placeholders with real values — no template placeholders in output
All 12 sections must be present in the output, even if some contain only TBD markers
Generate companion enforcement skill at .agents/skills/{project-slug}/SKILL.md — NOT under docs/
The companion SKILL.md description must name the specific project, not use a generic description
source: Rules/The companion SKILL.md is always project-specific

instruction: Use a lowercase-hyphenated slug for the .agents/skills/ directory name, derived from the project name
Print the Step 8 confirmation block listing: populated sections with token counts, and all TBD items
Keep patterns copy-pasteable — use actual HTML/JSX from the codebase, not pseudo-code or components that don't exist
Name the authoritative token file explicitly as the single source of truth in the reference sheet
source: Rules/One token file is the master

instruction: Do not generate from memory — run grep on config/CSS to confirm actual values rather than assuming framework defaults
Do not abort or refuse when the codebase has minimal tokens — produce the document with gaps marked as TBD
source: Eval-03 scenario + Rules/Mark gaps as TBD

instruction: Dark mode section must list overridden tokens with their dark values, not just state the strategy
